# Arcsite Design System
Single source of truth for Arcsite product UI.
All tokens are CSS custom properties — reference as `var(--token-name)`.
Tailwind 4 arbitrary value syntax: `bg-(--color-label-primary)`, `text-(--color-label-primary)`, etc.

Token resolution rule: bind layers and components to **semantic** tokens
(`--color-label-*`, `--color-fill-*`, `--color-surface-*`, `--color-border-*`,
`--size-spacing-*`, `--size-padding-*`, `--size-radius-*`, `--text-*`).
Globals (`--color-global-*`, `--size-global-*`) are primitives — only reference
them directly inside the design system itself, never in product UI.

---

## Token reference pages
- Typography tokens: /typography/tokens
- Color tokens:      /color/tokens
- Color swatches:    /color/swatches
- Size tokens:       /size/tokens

## Full token documentation
- /tokens/tokens-color.md
- /tokens/tokens-typography.md
- /tokens/tokens-size-space.md

---

## Icons — which library to use

**Rule of thumb: prefer the project's own icon library when one exists.**

1. **Working on the Arcsite user site** (`arcsite_web` repo)?
   Always pull icons from the project's bundled library:
   ```
   packages/arcsite-icons/icon
   ```
   (path relative to the `arcsite_web` repo root)
   You may still use this design system website as a *visual reference* to
   decide which icon to use, but the actual import must come from the
   `arcsite-icons` package — not from this design system.

2. **Working on a prototype or any project that does not have its own
   icon library**? Use the design system's icon library:
   - Visual browser:  /iconology
   - JSON manifest:   /icons.json   (machine-readable, includes inline SVG + tags)

   Each entry in `/icons.json` has:
   - `name`        — kebab-case identifier
   - `fileName`    — original upload filename
   - `tags`        — search keywords (intent + visual descriptors)
   - `svgContent`  — full inline SVG, ready to drop into a component

   Search the manifest by tag (e.g. `tags.includes("arrow")`) or name to
   pick an icon, then inline the `svgContent` directly.

---

## Color — light mode (semantic)
:root {
  --color-label-primary: var(--color-global-gray-85);
  --color-label-secondary: var(--color-global-gray-55);
  --color-label-tertiary: var(--color-global-gray-25);
  --color-label-quaternary: var(--color-global-gray-15);
  --color-label-primary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-85);
  --color-label-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-55);
  --color-label-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-25);
  --color-label-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-15);
  --color-label-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-100);
  --color-label-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-60);
  --color-label-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-30);
  --color-label-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-20);
  --color-label-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-60);
  --color-label-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-40);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-30);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-20);
  --color-label-brand-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-brand-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-50);
  --color-label-brand-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-60);
  --color-label-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-40);
  --color-label-action-tertiary: var(--color-global-blue-30);
  --color-label-action-quaternary: var(--color-global-blue-20);
  --color-label-action-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-action-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-action-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-action-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-50);
  --color-label-action-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-action-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-action-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-60);
  --color-label-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-40);
  --color-label-success-tertiary: var(--color-global-green-30);
  --color-label-success-quaternary: var(--color-global-green-20);
  --color-label-success-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-success-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-success-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-success-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-50);
  --color-label-success-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-success-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-success-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-60);
  --color-label-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-40);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary: var(--color-global-orange-30);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary: var(--color-global-orange-20);
  --color-label-caution-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-caution-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-50);
  --color-label-caution-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-65);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-40);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary: var(--color-global-yellow-30);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary: var(--color-global-yellow-20);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-50);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-60);
  --color-label-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-40);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary: var(--color-global-red-30);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary: var(--color-global-red-20);
  --color-label-danger-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-light-40);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-light-30);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-light-20);
  --color-label-danger-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-50);
  --color-label-danger-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-surface-default: var(--color-global-gray-00);
  --color-surface-dim: var(--color-global-gray-02);
  --color-surface-container-default: var(--color-global-gray-00);
  --color-surface-container-high: var(--color-global-gray-06);
  --color-surface-container-higher: var(--color-global-gray-10);
  --color-surface-container-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-00);
  --color-surface-container-high-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-06);
  --color-surface-container-higher-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-10);
  --color-surface-container-brand: var(--color-global-brand-orange-10);
  --color-surface-container-action: var(--color-global-blue-10);
  --color-surface-container-action-hover: var(--color-global-blue-20);
  --color-surface-container-success: var(--color-global-green-10);
  --color-surface-container-caution: var(--color-global-orange-10);
  --color-surface-container-caution-yellow: var(--color-global-yellow-10);
  --color-surface-container-danger: var(--color-global-red-10);
  --color-fill-secondary: var(--color-global-gray-10);
  --color-fill-tertiary: var(--color-global-gray-06);
  --color-fill-bright: var(--color-global-gray-00);
  --color-fill-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-60);
  --color-fill-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-20);
  --color-fill-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-60);
  --color-fill-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-20);
  --color-fill-action-tertiary: var(--color-global-blue-10);
  --color-fill-action-primary-hover: var(--color-global-blue-70);
  --color-fill-action-secondary-hover: var(--color-global-blue-30);
  --color-fill-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-60);
  --color-fill-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-20);
  --color-fill-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-60);
  --color-fill-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-20);
  --color-fill-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-60);
  --color-fill-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-20);
  --color-fill-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-60);
  --color-fill-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-20);
  --color-border-default: var(--color-global-gray-15);
  --color-border-extra: var(--color-global-gray-25);
  --color-border-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-15);
  --color-border-extra-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-25);
  --color-border-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-60);
  --color-border-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-30);
  --color-border-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-60);
  --color-border-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-30);
  --color-border-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-60);
  --color-border-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-30);
  --color-border-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-60);
  --color-border-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-30);
  --color-border-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-60);
  --color-border-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-30);
  --color-border-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-60);
  --color-border-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-30);
  --color-divider-default: var(--color-global-gray-10);
  --color-divider-extra: var(--color-global-gray-20);
  --color-divider-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-10);
  --color-divider-extra-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-20);
}

---

## Color — dark mode (semantic)
:root.dark, [data-theme='dark'] {
  --color-label-primary: var(--color-global-gray-00);
  --color-label-secondary: var(--color-global-gray-40);
  --color-label-tertiary: var(--color-global-gray-70);
  --color-label-quaternary: var(--color-global-gray-80);
  --color-label-primary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-100);
  --color-label-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-60);
  --color-label-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-30);
  --color-label-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-20);
  --color-label-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-100);
  --color-label-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-60);
  --color-label-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-30);
  --color-label-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-20);
  --color-label-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-50);
  --color-label-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-70);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-80);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-90);
  --color-label-brand-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-brand-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-50);
  --color-label-brand-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-brand-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-brand-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-brand-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-50);
  --color-label-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-70);
  --color-label-action-tertiary: var(--color-global-blue-80);
  --color-label-action-quaternary: var(--color-global-blue-90);
  --color-label-action-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-action-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-action-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-action-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-50);
  --color-label-action-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-action-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-action-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-blue-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-50);
  --color-label-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-70);
  --color-label-success-tertiary: var(--color-global-green-80);
  --color-label-success-quaternary: var(--color-global-green-90);
  --color-label-success-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-success-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-success-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-success-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-50);
  --color-label-success-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-success-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-success-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-green-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-50);
  --color-label-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-70);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary: var(--color-global-orange-80);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary: var(--color-global-orange-90);
  --color-label-caution-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-50);
  --color-label-caution-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-orange-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-50);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-70);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary: var(--color-global-yellow-80);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary: var(--color-global-yellow-90);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-50);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-caution-yellow-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-yellow-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-50);
  --color-label-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-70);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary: var(--color-global-red-80);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary: var(--color-global-red-90);
  --color-label-danger-secondary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-label-danger-primary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-50);
  --color-label-danger-secondary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-70);
  --color-label-danger-tertiary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-80);
  --color-label-danger-quaternary-on-dark-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-red-transparency-on-dark-90);
  --color-surface-default: var(--color-global-gray-90);
  --color-surface-dim: var(--color-global-gray-95);
  --color-surface-container-default: var(--color-global-gray-90);
  --color-surface-container-high: var(--color-global-gray-80);
  --color-surface-container-higher: var(--color-global-gray-75);
  --color-surface-container-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-10);
  --color-surface-container-high-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-20);
  --color-surface-container-higher-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-25);
  --color-surface-container-brand: var(--color-global-brand-orange-95);
  --color-surface-container-action: var(--color-global-blue-95);
  --color-surface-container-action-hover: var(--color-global-blue-100);
  --color-surface-container-success: var(--color-global-green-95);
  --color-surface-container-caution: var(--color-global-orange-95);
  --color-surface-container-caution-yellow: var(--color-global-yellow-95);
  --color-surface-container-danger: var(--color-global-red-95);
  --color-fill-secondary: var(--color-global-gray-75);
  --color-fill-tertiary: var(--color-global-gray-80);
  --color-fill-bright: var(--color-global-gray-90);
  --color-fill-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-50);
  --color-fill-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-90);
  --color-fill-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-50);
  --color-fill-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-90);
  --color-fill-action-tertiary: var(--color-global-blue-95);
  --color-fill-action-primary-hover: var(--color-global-blue-40);
  --color-fill-action-secondary-hover: var(--color-global-blue-95);
  --color-fill-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-50);
  --color-fill-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-90);
  --color-fill-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-50);
  --color-fill-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-90);
  --color-fill-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-50);
  --color-fill-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-90);
  --color-fill-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-50);
  --color-fill-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-90);
  --color-border-default: var(--color-global-gray-75);
  --color-border-extra: var(--color-global-gray-65);
  --color-border-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-15);
  --color-border-extra-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-25);
  --color-border-action-primary: var(--color-global-blue-50);
  --color-border-action-secondary: var(--color-global-blue-80);
  --color-border-success-primary: var(--color-global-green-50);
  --color-border-success-secondary: var(--color-global-green-80);
  --color-border-danger-primary: var(--color-global-red-50);
  --color-border-danger-secondary: var(--color-global-red-80);
  --color-border-caution-primary: var(--color-global-orange-50);
  --color-border-caution-secondary: var(--color-global-orange-80);
  --color-border-caution-yellow-primary: var(--color-global-yellow-50);
  --color-border-caution-yellow-secondary: var(--color-global-yellow-80);
  --color-border-brand-primary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-50);
  --color-border-brand-secondary: var(--color-global-brand-orange-80);
  --color-divider-default: var(--color-global-gray-80);
  --color-divider-extra: var(--color-global-gray-70);
  --color-divider-default-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-20);
  --color-divider-extra-increased-contrast: var(--color-global-gray-transparency-on-dark-30);
}

---

## Color — global palette (raw primitives)
:root {
  --color-global-gray-10: #E6E6E6;
  --color-global-gray-15: #D9D9D9;
  --color-global-gray-20: #CCCCCC;
  --color-global-gray-25: #BFBFBF;
  --color-global-gray-30: #B2B2B2;
  --color-global-gray-40: #999999;
  --color-global-gray-50: #808080;
  --color-global-gray-55: #737373;
  --color-global-gray-60: #666666;
  --color-global-gray-65: #595959;
  --color-global-gray-70: #4D4D4D;
  --color-global-gray-75: #404040;
  --color-global-gray-80: #333333;
  --color-global-gray-85: #262626;
  --color-global-gray-90: #1A1A1A;
  --color-global-gray-95: #0D0D0D;
  --color-global-gray-100: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-06: #F0F0F0;
  --color-global-gray-02: #FAFAFA;
  --color-global-gray-00: #FFFFFF;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-10: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-15: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-20: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-25: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-40: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-55: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-65: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-70: #000000;

  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-80: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-85: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-100: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-06: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-02: #000000;
  --color-global-gray-transparency-on-light-00: #000000;

---

## Typography — web desktop
:root {
  --font-typeface-text: Inter;
  --font-typeface-display: Inter;
  --font-size-body-medium: 14px;
  --font-size-body-large: 16px;
  --font-size-body-small: 12px;
  --font-size-body-tiny: 10px;
  --font-size-body-line-height-large: 22px;
  --font-size-body-line-height-medium: 18px;
  --font-size-body-line-height-small: 16px;
  --font-size-body-line-height-tiny: 14px;
  --font-size-title-large: 32px;
  --font-size-title-medium: 24px;
  --font-size-title-small: 16px;
  --font-size-title-line-height-large: 40px;
  --font-size-title-line-height-medium: 30px;
  --font-size-title-line-height-small: 22px;
  --font-font-weight-thin: 100px;
  --font-font-weight-extralight: 200px;
  --font-font-weight-light: 300px;
  --font-font-weight-regular: 400px;
  --font-font-weight-medium: 500px;
  --font-font-weight-semibold: 600px;
  --font-font-weight-bold: 700px;
  --font-font-weight-extrabold: 800px;
  --font-font-weight-black: 900px;
  --font-letter-spacing-title-large: -1.0499999523162842px;
  --font-letter-spacing-title-medium: -0.44999998807907104px;
}

---

## Size & space — web desktop (semantic)
:root {
  --size-spacing-inline-xs: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-spacing-inline-sm: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-spacing-inline-md: var(--size-global-16);
  --size-spacing-inline-lg: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-spacing-inline-xl: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-spacing-stack-xs: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-spacing-stack-sm: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-spacing-stack-md: var(--size-global-16);
  --size-spacing-stack-lg: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-spacing-stack-xl: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-padding-xs: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-padding-sm: var(--size-global-16);
  --size-padding-md: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-padding-lg: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-padding-xl: var(--size-global-48);
  --size-padding-component-xs: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-padding-component-sm: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-padding-component-md: var(--size-global-12);
  --size-padding-component-lg: var(--size-global-20);
  --size-padding-component-xl: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-radius-xs: var(--size-global-2);
  --size-radius-none: 0px;
  --size-radius-sm: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-radius-md: var(--size-global-6);
  --size-radius-lg: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-radius-xl: var(--size-global-12);
  --size-radius-full: var(--size-global-9999);
  --size-icon-sm: var(--size-global-16);
  --size-icon-md: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-icon-lg: var(--size-global-30);
  --size-layout-columns: 24px;
  --size-layout-margin: var(--size-global-40);
  --size-layout-gutter: var(--size-global-16);
  --size-layout-column-min-width: var(--size-global-48);
  --size-layout-max-content-width: var(--size-global-1280);
  --size-layout-max-text-width: var(--size-global-680);
  --size-touch-target: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-button-height-xl: var(--size-global-48);
  --size-comp-button-height-lg: var(--size-global-40);
  --size-comp-button-height-md: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-button-height-sm: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-comp-button-radius-default: var(--size-radius-sm);
  --size-comp-button-radius-rounded: var(--size-radius-full);
  --size-comp-button-padding-horizontal-lg: var(--size-padding-component-lg);
  --size-comp-button-padding-horizontal-md: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-button-padding-horizontal-sm: var(--size-padding-component-sm);
  --size-comp-button-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-sm);
  --size-comp-input-height-xl: 0px;
  --size-comp-input-height-lg: var(--size-global-40);
  --size-comp-input-height-md: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-input-height-sm: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-comp-input-padding-horizontal: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-input-radius: var(--size-radius-xs);
  --size-comp-input-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-xs);
  --size-comp-input-padding-vertical-md: var(--size-global-6);
  --size-comp-input-padding-vertical-sm: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-comp-input-padding-vertical-lg: var(--size-global-12);
  --size-comp-tag-height-sm: var(--size-global-18);
  --size-comp-tag-radius-default: var(--size-radius-sm);
  --size-comp-tag-radius-rounded: var(--size-radius-full);
  --size-comp-tag-padding-h-tiny: 0px;
  --size-comp-tag-padding-h-sm: var(--size-global-6);
  --size-comp-tag-padding-h-md: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-comp-tag-padding-h-lg: var(--size-global-10);
  --size-comp-tag-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-sm);
  --size-comp-tag-height-md: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-comp-tag-height-lg: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-tab-height-md: var(--size-global-40);
  --size-comp-tab-container-radius: 0px;
  --size-comp-tab-container-padding: 0px;
  --size-comp-tab-button-radius: var(--size-radius-sm);
  --size-comp-tab-button-padding-horizontal: 0px;
  --size-comp-tab-padding: var(--size-spacing-stack-sm);
  --size-comp-tab-height-sm: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-table-cell-height: var(--size-global-24);
  --size-comp-table-cell-padding-horizontal: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-comp-table-cell-padding-vertical: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-comp-table-header-gap: var(--size-global-8);
  --size-comp-toggle-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-sm);
  --size-comp-toggle-label-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-md);
  --size-comp-list-item-height-lg: var(--size-global-40);
  --size-comp-list-item-height-sm: var(--size-global-32);
  --size-comp-list-item-padding-horizontal: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-list-item-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-md);
  --size-comp-alert-padding: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-alert-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-xs);
  --size-comp-alert-radius: var(--size-radius-xs);
  --size-comp-toast-padding-horizontal: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-toast-padding-vertical: var(--size-padding-component-sm);
  --size-comp-toast-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-md);
  --size-comp-toast-radius: var(--size-radius-sm);
  --size-comp-card-padding: var(--size-padding-sm);
  --size-comp-card-gap: var(--size-spacing-stack-sm);
  --size-comp-card-radius: var(--size-radius-md);
  --size-comp-popover-padding: var(--size-padding-component-md);
  --size-comp-popover-gap: var(--size-spacing-inline-md);
  --size-comp-popover-radius: var(--size-radius-xs);
  --size-comp-progress-track-height: var(--size-global-4);
  --size-comp-progress-radius: var(--size-radius-full);
  --size-comp-dialog-padding-sm: var(--size-padding-sm);
  --size-comp-dialog-padding-md: var(--size-padding-md);
  --size-comp-dialog-padding-lg: var(--size-padding-lg);
  --size-comp-dialog-padding-xl: var(--size-padding-xl);
}

---

## Size & space — global scale (raw primitives)
:root {
  --size-global-2: 2px;
  --size-global-4: 4px;
  --size-global-6: 6px;
  --size-global-8: 8px;
  --size-global-10: 10px;
  --size-global-12: 12px;
  --size-global-16: 16px;
  --size-global-18: 18px;
  --size-global-20: 20px;
  --size-global-24: 24px;
  --size-global-28: 28px;
  --size-global-30: 30px;
  --size-global-32: 32px;
  --size-global-34: 34px;
  --size-global-36: 36px;
  --size-global-40: 40px;
  --size-global-44: 44px;
  --size-global-48: 48px;
  --size-global-50: 50px;
  --size-global-64: 64px;
  --size-global-80: 80px;
  --size-global-96: 96px;
  --size-global-128: 128px;
  --size-global-680: 680px;
  --size-global-1280: 1280px;
  --size-global-9999: 9999px;
}
